title: How Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian are adopting AI coding
summary: Engineering leaders from Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian discuss how their organizations are adopting AI coding tools at scale. They address workflow changes, productivity measurement, and lessons for other leaders navigating this transition, covering case studies like small pods completing nine-month roadmaps in one month and the inversion of the SDLC bell curve.
